summary: Iteration 99: Verified Pet Soul Score consistency fix and Concierge Experience Admin UI integration. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend features working correctly.

my_pets_endpoint.details: Returns pets with overall_score calculated using weighted scoring

score_state_endpoint.details: Returns score data with tier information

consistency_check.details: Both endpoints return identical score (18.4%) - BUG FIXED

create_experience.details: Creates new experience with all fields

concierge_xp_tab.details: Tab appears in admin dashboard, shows 18 experiences, 8 pillars covered

add_experience_button.details: Button visible and opens create dialog

hamburger_menu.details: Hamburger menu icon visible and clickable

menu_opens.details: Menu opens showing all 14 pillars, Sign In, Join Now, Ask Mira, Pet Life Pass

login.details: Member login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 works

pet_soul_score_display.details: Dashboard shows 18% Pet Soul Score consistently in header and pet card

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed concierge experience for testing (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 verified: 1) Pet Soul Score consistency BUG FIXED - /api/pets/my-pets now uses calculate_pet_soul_score() from pet_score_logic.py, returning same score (18.4%) as /api/pet-score/{id}/score_state. 2) Concierge Experience Admin fully integrated in Admin.jsx - tab visible, CRUD operations working, 18 experiences across 8 pillars. 3) Mobile hamburger menu working correctly - opens to show all navigation options. 4) Member dashboard displays Pet Soul Score consistently at 18%.

pet_soul_score_fix.bug_description: Pet Soul Score was inconsistent between /api/pets/my-pets and /api/pet-score/{id}/score_state
pet_soul_score_fix.fix_description: Updated get_my_pets endpoint to use calculate_pet_soul_score() from pet_score_logic.py instead of legacy scoring
pet_soul_score_fix.verification: Both endpoints now return 18.4% for test pet Mojo
